name: Sauerkraut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and cocoa.
2. Add dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt) and shortening to the sugar mixture. Blend until well combined.
3. Stir in the sauerkraut, sour cream, vanilla, eggs, and water until just mixed.
4. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
8. Frost the cooled cake with chocolate frosting and sprinkle with coconut.
Note: This recipe is for clarity and consistency only. The original instructions included blending in shortening, which may not be necessary if using an electric mixer to combine all ingredients first. Adjustments can be made based on personal preference.
